# Flowform Studio

> Flowform Studio is a boutique UX/UI design studio offering unlimited design requests at a flat monthly subscription rate. Founded in 2017 by Igor Ginzburg.

## What is Flowform Studio?

Flowform Studio provides senior-level UX/UI design on a subscription basis — a flexible alternative to hiring a full-time designer or engaging a traditional agency. Clients pay a flat monthly fee and get unlimited design requests with 24–48 hour average turnaround.

## Key Facts

- **Founded:** 2017
- **Founder:** Igor Ginzburg — Senior UX/UI Designer with 9+ years of experience
- **Model:** Subscription-based design studio (Design as a Service / DaaS)
- **Turnaround:** 24–48 hours per request
- **Contact:** info@flowformstudio.com
- **Website:** https://www.flowformstudio.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/igorginzburg/

## Services Offered

- Web & Mobile App Design (UX/UI)
- Design Systems & Style Guides
- Wireframes & Prototypes
- Brand & Visual Identity
- Landing Pages & Marketing Assets
- Product UX & UI (SaaS, B2B, consumer)
- AI-enhanced workflows and vibe coding support

## How It Works

1. **Submit Request** — via Trello, Jira, Notion, or other task tools
2. **Work Begins** — Igor or his small trusted team picks up the task
3. **Receive Design in 24h** — delivered with full Figma files, organized and developer-ready

## Pricing Model

- Flat monthly subscription (one or more active tasks at a time, depending on plan)
- No contracts — pause or cancel anytime
- 7-day free trial available
- Unlimited revisions within active subscription

## Differentiators vs. Agencies and Full-Time Hires

| | Flowform | Agency | Full-Time Hire |
|---|---|---|---|
| Experience level | Senior, guaranteed | Often junior-led | Varies |
| Timeline | 24-48h per request | Months per project | Months per project |
| Flexibility | Pause anytime | Fixed contracts | 12mo+ commitment |
| Revisions | Unlimited | Extra cost | Included |

## FAQs

**Is there a limit to design requests?**
No. You can queue as many as you'd like. We work through them one at a time (or more on higher plans), ensuring focus and quality.

**Who designs the work?**
All work is designed and overseen by Igor Ginzburg, founder of Flowform. No outsourcing or hand-offs to juniors you've never met.

**What tools are used?**
Primarily Figma. Files are always organized, reusable, and developer-friendly.

**What projects are not taken on?**
Development/coding, content writing, 3D/heavy illustration, complex motion work, complex photo manipulations, and rush work that compromises quality.

**What is the refund policy?**
No refunds, but unlimited revisions within your active subscription.
